pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/control_knob.FCStd'

Calculated from component volumes: Base (π×12.5²×5=2454.4) + Grip (π×7.5²×12=2120.6) - Socket (π×3²×10=282.7) - Groove (1.5×6×1=9.0) = 4283.2 mm³. Difference of 0.8 mm³ is 0.02% error due to rounding.
No authoritative reference found; tolerance appears reasonable (3.5% of target volume) for 3D printed parts
Task specifies cylindrical base with 25mm diameter. Grip (15mm) sits on top and is smaller, so bounding box X = 25.0 mm
Task specifies cylindrical base with 25mm diameter. For circular cross-section, Y = 25.0 mm
Task specifies base height 5mm + grip height 12mm = 17.0 mm total height
No authoritative reference; represents ±0.5mm tolerance on each dimension, typical for precision manufacturing
Weighted average: (Base_vol×COM_base_z + Grip_vol×COM_grip_z - Socket_vol×COM_socket_z) / total_vol = (2454.4×2.5 + 2120.6×11 - 282.7×2.5) / 4283.2 ≈ 6.6 mm. Difference of 0.1 mm is within tolerance.
No authoritative reference; represents ±1.0mm tolerance for center of mass Z calculation
FreeCAD operations correctly match task requirements: Pad creates cylindrical base and grip; Pocket creates D-shaft socket blind hole; Fillet creates 1mm edge rounding

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD design task (no external datasets). The control knob design consists of a 25mm diameter cylindrical base (5mm high) with a 15mm diameter cylindrical grip (12mm high) on top, creating an overall bounding box of 25×25×17 mm. The design includes a D-shaft mounting socket (6mm diameter, 10mm deep), a 1.5×6×1mm position indicator groove, and a 1mm fillet on the grip's top edge. Calculated target volume is 4283.2 mm³ (claimed 4284.0), target center of mass Z is 6.6 mm (claimed 6.5). All geometric dimensions verified against task specification. Required FreeCAD features (Pad, Pocket, Fillet) correctly map to design elements.
